form.formComment: Resuming after a five-and-a-half months break. Finished off last campaign fourth of 14 at Warrnambool Mdn-Sw October 30 over 1200m, 0.6 len behind Star Compass carrying 59.5kg at $3.40. On debut second of 11 at Hamilton 4yo+ Mdn-Sw October 11 over 1100m, soft track; 0.8 len behind Legacy Bel with 59.5kg at $5.50. Should take beating fresh.

form.formComment: Resuming after a break of nine weeks. Finished off last preparation fifth of 12 at Naracoorte 3yo+ Mdn-Sw February 8 over 1430m, 10 len behind Ambushed carrying 58kg at $13. First up last campaign ran last of 12 at Warrnambool 4yo+ Mdn-Sw January 11 over 1200m, 5.5 len behind Sirleaf with 59.5kg at $101. See this one from a wide gate.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(1.5). Resuming after a break of nine weeks. previousStarts.stewardsComment: Had difficulty obtaining clear running from the 200m until near the 100m.
Attempted to buck shortly after the start.
Raced keenly in the middle stages.

form.formComment: Having third race start. At big odds at debut, 2nd of 11 at Geelong Mdn-Sw on March 14 over 1112m, 2.75 len behind Conflict with 59.5kg at $26. Last start 4th in a small field at Geelong Mdn-Sw on April 1 over 1100m, 5 len behind Pasadena carrying 59.5kg at $8.50. Plenty of scope for improvement and is right in the mix.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-7). Having third race start. At big odds at debut, 2nd of 11 at Geelong Mdn-Sw on March 14 over 1112m, 2.75 len behind Conflict with 59.5kg at $26. previousStarts.stewardsComment: Slow to begin. Held up momentarily passing the 400m.

form.formComment: Was at big odds at debut, raced on the speed and boxed on steadily 4th of 10 at Avoca Mdn-Sw on March 29 over 1300m, 8 len behind Abby's Crossword carrying 59.5kg at $41. Looks tested.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(1). Was at big odds at debut, raced on the speed and boxed on steadily 4th of 10 at Avoca Mdn-Sw on March 29 over 1300m, 8 len behind Abby's Crossword carrying 59.5kg at $41. Looks tested.

form.formComment: Resuming. Finished off last preparation sixth of 8 at Cranbourne Vg Carat December 27 over 1200m, 4 len behind Steel Move carrying 56kg at $51. On debut second of 9 at Geelong Mdn-Sw December 12 over 1230m, 3.5 len behind Tower Bridge with 58kg at $5.50. Looks forward enough after a recent trial win. Has ability and can return a winner.

form.formComment: Gelding by Crackerjack King facing the starter for the first time. Fitter for a jump-out on March 30 at Camperdown when finished fourth. Happy to watch this time.

form.formComment: Third race start. First start failed to make an impression; second last of 8 at Warrnambool 3yo Mdn-Sw on January 11 over 1200m, 10 len behind Celestial Splendor carrying 56.5kg at $5.50. Went for a spell before returning 4th of 10 at Avoca Mdn-Sw on March 29 over 1100m, 2.5 len behind Life After Love carrying 59kg at $4.80. Possible improver.

form.formComment: Second-up. First-up after five months 3rd of 11 at Mt Gambier 2yo+ Mdn Hcp on March 22 over 900m, 1.2 len behind Whathappensinvegas carrying 56kg at $1.90. previousStarts.stewardsComment: Began awkwardly then crowded for room to the inside of Share The Stars.
Slow into stride. Eased down over the final 200m.
Slow to begin. Hung in under pressure in the straight.

form.formComment: First starter by Nicconi out of Waitomo Toka purchased for AUD $ 35,000 (Inglis 2024 Premier Yearling Sale). Has a total of seven trials leading in today's debut. Watch the market.
